title: Oil falls over 5% as Iran signals safe passage for ‘non-hostile’ ships through Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.
summary_public: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran signals safe passage for ‘non-hostile’ ships through Strait of Hormuz
